title: Open To Multiplayer
description: Makes the game open to the multiplayer screen by default
body:
##  Open To Multiplayer
This mod does exactly as the name implies, it makes the game open to the multiplayer screen instead of the title screen when first opening the game for things like server packs or PVP instances. This does not stop you from starting singleplayer worlds though, as pressing "cancel" still brings you back to the title screen.
